taskId.title: taskId
taskId.description: The Salesforce ID of the Task created to log the date preferences.

confirmationMessage.title: confirmationMessage
confirmationMessage.description: A confirmation message summarizing the collected preferences.

success.title: success
success.description: Indicates whether the preferences were collected successfully.

preferredDate1.title: preferredDate1
preferredDate1.description: The first preferred install date passed through for use by the next step.

preferredTime1.title: preferredTime1
preferredTime1.description: The time of day for the first preference passed through for use by the next step.

preferredDate2.title: preferredDate2
preferredDate2.description: The second preferred install date passed through for use by the next step.

preferredTime2.title: preferredTime2
preferredTime2.description: The time of day for the second preference passed through for use by the next step.

preferredDate3.title: preferredDate3
preferredDate3.description: The third preferred install date passed through for use by the next step.

preferredTime3.title: preferredTime3
preferredTime3.description: The time of day for the third preference passed through for use by the next step.
